actions.title: Hide Plan tab until it has content
actions.plan: 1. In PersonalContainer.qml, remove 'Plan' from the tab bar Repeater model. 2. Remove the PlanView from the StackLayout. 3. Keep PlanView.qml file intact for future use. 4. Adjust tab bar width calculation (now /2 instead of /3).
actions.spawn_prompt:
Hide the Plan tab from the personal app UI — it's a stub that shows 'Guidance, action items go here' and makes the app feel unfinished.

File: `familydiagram/pkdiagram/resources/qml/Personal/PersonalContainer.qml`

Changes:
1. In the StackLayout (id: stack, ~line 305), remove the `Personal.PlanView` block (lines ~327-331)
2. In the tab bar Repeater (~line 357), change the model from `["Discuss", "Learn", "Plan"]` to `["Discuss", "Learn"]`
3. In the tab bar item width calculation (~line 360), change `root.width / 3` to `root.width / 2`
4. Remove the static 'Plan' title text in the header (~line 195-202, the block with `visible: tabBar.currentIndex === 2`)
5. Remove `property var planView: planView` from the root properties (~line 23)

Do NOT delete PlanView.qml — just disconnect it from the UI.

Acceptance criteria:
- App shows only Discuss and Learn tabs, evenly split
- No references to planView cause runtime errors (search for planView usage in other QML files)
- Header shows correct title for each tab
actions.success_metric: Personal app shows 2 tabs (Discuss, Learn) with no empty stub visible

actions.title: Add label to extract button for discoverability
actions.plan: 1. In PersonalContainer.qml, replace the extract button's canvas-drawn icon with a text label 'Build Diagram' inside a rounded rectangle. 2. Keep the same position (top-right of header on Discuss tab). 3. Widen the button to fit the text.
actions.spawn_prompt:
Replace the cryptic extract button icon with a text label for better discoverability.

File: `familydiagram/pkdiagram/resources/qml/Personal/PersonalContainer.qml`

The extract button is at ~line 231-276 (id: extractButton). It's a 28x28 circle with a Canvas-drawn down-arrow icon. New users have no idea what it does.

Changes:
1. Replace the extractButton Rectangle (~lines 231-276) with a wider pill-shaped button:
   - width: auto-sized to text + padding (use `extractLabel.implicitWidth + 20`)
   - height: 32
   - radius: 16
   - Same color: `util.IS_UI_DARK_MODE ? "#4495F7" : "#007AFF"`
   - Remove the Canvas element entirely
   - Add a Text element (id: extractLabel) with text: "Build Diagram", color: "white", font.pixelSize: 13, font.weight: Font.Medium
   - Keep the same anchors (right side of header, verticalCenter)
   - Keep the same MouseArea + onClicked: personalApp.extractFull()
   - Keep the same visible: tabBar.currentIndex === 0
   - Keep objectName: "extractButton"

2. Adjust pdpBadge anchoring — it anchors to `extractButton.left`, so it should still work with the wider button

Acceptance criteria:
- 'Build Diagram' text button visible on Discuss tab header, right side
- Tapping it calls personalApp.extractFull() (same as before)
- PDP badge still appears correctly to the left of the button
- Button is readable on both light and dark mode
actions.success_metric: Extract button shows 'Build Diagram' text instead of cryptic icon
